narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 5-C (precinct in Ross County) has 632 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.1 percentage points.
